Brand.name: UNIREAL
Brand.tagline: Real reviews and answers about universities worldwide

Home.heroTitle: Find the right university — with real student voices
Home.heroSubtitle: Explore thousands of universities worldwide. Read honest reviews, ask questions, and get verified answers.
Home.feature1Body: Thousands of universities across 200+ countries — each profile in your own language, with admission dates, tuition for international students and the programs taught in English, all in one place. Wherever you want to study, UNIREAL already covers it.
Home.feature2Body: Reviews and answers from real students and applicants — verified through their university email and gathered from trusted sources so you read genuine experiences, not marketing. See exactly who is behind every opinion.
Home.feature3Body: Ratings, tuition data, deadlines and outcomes kept continuously up to date from public sources — transparent, unbiased and free to browse. No stale brochures, just the facts you need to decide with confidence.
Home.subscribeBody: Free to explore, even better with Pro. Get always-fresh, AI-refreshed data, deadline alerts and side-by-side comparisons so you never miss an opportunity or rely on outdated information.
Home.subscribePerk1: Always up-to-date admission dates, tuition and program data
Home.subscribePerk2: Personalized deadline reminders on your calendar
Home.subscribePerk3: Aggregated reviews from across the web in one place
